name: Progress Billing Summary
html:
Progress Billing Summary
{{ doc.name }}

Customer{{ doc.customer_name or doc.customer }}
Contract Value{{ doc.get_formatted("grand_total") }}
Total % Billed{{ "%.2f"|format(doc.per_billed or 0) }}%
Remaining %{{ "%.2f"|format(100 - (doc.per_billed or 0)) }}%
{%- for row in doc.pb_progress_billing_log|sort(attribute="progress_no") -%} {%- set live = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Invoice", row.sales_invoice, ["grand_total", "outstanding_amount"], as_dict=True) or {} -%} {%- set live_paid = (live.grand_total or 0) - (live.outstanding_amount or 0) -%} {%- endfor -%}
Progress No. Invoice % Invoice Amount Paid Outstanding Status
{{ row.progress_no }} {{ row.sales_invoice }} {{ "%.2f"|format(row.billing_percentage or 0) }}% {{ row.get_formatted("billing_amount", doc) }} {{ "%.2f"|format(live_paid) }} {{ "%.2f"|format(live.outstanding_amount or 0) }} {{ row.invoice_status }}
